content:
===BEGIN===
Imagine you have a special notebook where you write down every time you trade your toys with friends. But instead of keeping the notebook at your house, all your friends have a copy too! Whenever someone trades a toy, everyone writes it down in their own notebook at the same time. This way, everyone knows exactly what happened, and no one can cheat or change the story later.

Blockchain works like those special notebooks, but for money and other important things. Usually, banks keep track of money, but with blockchain, lots of computers all over the world keep the records together. They check with each other to make sure every trade is real. Because everyone has the same information, there’s no need for a big bank in the middle. This makes it very safe and fair for everyone, just like sharing the notebook with all your friends!
